================================================================================
  PRICE Statistics Dump for database: imdb
================================================================================

================================================================================
  1. abbrev_col_type.pkl
================================================================================

--- Table Abbreviations ---
  aka_name                       -> imdb_an
  aka_title                      -> imdb_at
  cast_info                      -> imdb_ci
  char_name                      -> imdb_chn
  comp_cast_type                 -> imdb_cct
  company_name                   -> imdb_cpn
  company_type                   -> imdb_ct
  complete_cast                  -> imdb_cc
  info_type                      -> imdb_it
  keyword                        -> imdb_kw
  kind_type                      -> imdb_kt
  link_type                      -> imdb_lt
  movie_companies                -> imdb_mc
  movie_info                     -> imdb_mi
  movie_info_idx                 -> imdb_mii
  movie_keyword                  -> imdb_mk
  movie_link                     -> imdb_ml
  name                           -> imdb_n
  person_info                    -> imdb_pi
  role_type                      -> imdb_rt
  title                          -> imdb_t

--- Column Types ---
  imdb_ci:
    continuous : ['movie_id', 'person_id', 'id', 'person_role_id', 'nr_order']
    discrete   : ['role_id']
  imdb_mc:
    continuous : ['movie_id', 'id']
    discrete   : ['company_type_id', 'company_id']
  imdb_mi:
    continuous : ['movie_id', 'id']
    discrete   : ['info_type_id']
  imdb_mii:
    continuous : ['movie_id', 'id']
    discrete   : ['info_type_id']
  imdb_mk:
    continuous : ['movie_id', 'id']
    discrete   : ['keyword_id']
  imdb_t:
    continuous : ['id', 'production_year', 'episode_nr', 'episode_of_id']
    discrete   : ['kind_id']
